result:
All changes are confined to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/`; no commits, no files touched outside the workspace, OOM guards untouched, and the only Haskell read was the sanctioned BSD `pretty-1.1.3.6`. The `predtest` entries are build-artifact residue under `target/`, not source. Everything is green.

Round 5 complete. Plain-text summary follows.

---

ROUND 5 — three observable gaps closed; all suites green (83 tests: lib 6, round1 47, round2 9, round3 10, round4 6, round5 5); BEHAVIOR.md + QUERIES.log updated with each law.

WITNESS / ORACLE WORK
- Oracle-ran features/macros/MacroInLemmasAndRestrictions.spthy (the named witness) + RAW tail; 3 constructed probes (workspace/scratchpad/probes/r5_mac2, r5_mac1, r5_allmacro). Consulted the SANCTIONED BSD /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/graphdot/sanctioned/pretty-1.1.3.6 HughesPJ source (beside/display) to pin `<>` continuation semantics — no tamarin HS source read. All logged in QUERIES.log.

GAP 1 — restriction statement vs expanded formula
- Confirmed: statement renders MACRO form (`A( m(m3(x)) )`), the `expanded formula:` comment renders the macro-EXPANDED form (`A( x )`) — two distinct values (equal only when macro-free; predicate expansion is upstream of both).
- Model: added `Restriction.expanded: Formula` (caller-supplied opaque input) in src/ast.rs; src/lemma.rs `restriction_doc` now renders `r.formula` in the statement and `r.expanded` in the comment.
- Probed LEMMAS (exists- AND all-traces): they carry NO separate expanded comment — statement is macro-form, the guarded comment is the expanded opaque input (already handled). No lemma change needed.

GAP 2 — macros block always breaks
- Confirmed (probe:r5_mac2): two short macros that fit one line STILL break. src/macros.rs `macros_doc` changed `sep`→`vcat` (first macro beside `macros: `, each subsequent at col 8, commas on the preceding macro; single macro one line).

GAP 3 — theory frame (`theory NAME begin … end`)
- Implemented src/theory.rs `render`: `theory NAME`\n\n`begin`\n\n signature-first \n\n items(source order, one blank between) \n\n\n\n`end`. The 3 trailing blanks are the stripped-wf/stamp residue (RAW-tail verified; all 44 captures end that way).
- Extended src/ast.rs `TheoryItem` so rules carry `AcVariants` and lemmas carry `Guarded`, plus `Heuristic(String)` and `Verbatim(String)` (opaque tactic:/section{* *}// looping-facts comments).
- Implemented `render_predicates` (src/macros.rs): `predicate: <fact><=><formula>`, group blank-separated. Key finding (target dmn-basic + sanctioned HughesPJ): the body wraps at ABSOLUTE margin 0 independent of header width, so the header is spliced textually onto the margin-0 formula (a `<>`-beside would wrongly indent under `<=>`).
- Acceptance test tests/round5_theory.rs `whole_echo_frame_parity`: reconstructs 29 diverse whole captures via a layout-insensitive parser and asserts render_theory byte-matches every one (exceeds the ≥15 requirement; spans builtins variety, macros, rules ± variants, loop breakers, SAPIC process attrs, restrictions ± safety ± expanded, lemmas all/exists ± attrs ± embedded proof, predicates, heuristic, tactic, section comments). Plus focused unit tests: gap2_macros_block_always_breaks, predicate_one_liner…, predicate_wrapping_body_wraps_at_margin_independent_of_header, gap3_frame_glue_order_spacing_and_tail; and round3 restriction_macro_statement_vs_expanded.

KEY FILES (all absolute)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/src/theory.rs (frame)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/src/macros.rs (macros always-break, predicates margin-0 splice)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/src/ast.rs (Restriction.expanded; TheoryItem variants)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/src/lemma.rs (statement/expanded split)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/src/lib.rs (render_macros/render_predicates exported)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/tests/round5_theory.rs (new; 29-file frame parity + 4 focused tests)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/pretty-clean/tests/round3_formulas.rs (GAP-1 test + parser now parses the expanded comment)
- /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/BEHAVIOR.md, /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/workspace/QUERIES.log (laws + provenance)

NOTE FOR INTEGRATION: the frame's fixed 3-blank pre-`end` tail is the residue of the always-present stripped wf report + Generated-from stamp; verified against all curated captures but the full-corpus pretty_gate is the integrator's backstop for any file carrying trailing source formal comments.

The round-5 both-sides similarity audit is complete and appended to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/AUDIT.md`.

Summary of what I audited and found (round-5 delta = uncommitted working tree over cleanroom HEAD `8341919`, restricted to `pretty/`):

**Scope**: `src/theory.rs` (the `theory … begin … end` frame, previously an `unimplemented!` stub), `src/macros.rs` (macros block `sep`→`vcat`; `render_predicates`), `src/lemma.rs` (restriction comment → `r.expanded`), `src/ast.rs` (`Restriction.expanded`; reshaped `TheoryItem`), `src/lib.rs`, plus tests + provenance notes + 3 probes.

**Key findings — no violations:**
- **Frame traversal (the mandated scrutiny point) does NOT mirror upstream's item-fold.** Upstream `prettyTheory` uses `foldTheoryItem` with 8 handlers over an 8-constructor `TheoryItem`, hoists config-blocks to the front and tactic/heuristic/cache to fixed slots from separate fields, and `vsep`s a `[Doc]`. The clean is a 7-arm `match` over its own erasure-driven enum (`Verbatim` collapses Text/Config/Translation/tactic/comments; `Heuristic` promoted; solver inputs item-bundled), does none of the hoisting, and assembles by column-0 `String` join. Materially different decomposition.
- **Item order / spacing / 3-blank-before-`end` tail** are byte-forced merger; I independently re-verified the 3-blank tail across real captures (BP_IBS, C8, cav13, NSLPK3…) and the 29-file `whole_echo_frame_parity` reconstruction.
- **Macros `sep`→`vcat`**: byte-forced by a logged `r5_mac2` falsification (two fitting macros still break); the block Doc construction (`"macros: " <> vcat`) stays divergent from upstream's `keyword_ "macros:" $$ nest 4` overlap trick. (I resolved the apparent `$$`/col-8 discrepancy: `prettyMacro`'s inner `nest 4` compounds to 8 > width-7, triggering `$$` overlap — source and oracle agree.)
- **Restriction expanded split**: clean's own rendered-role field model (no `ogFormula :: Maybe`); safety-on-statement diverges from upstream's safety-on-`expandedFormula` but is provably byte-neutral (macros are term-level).
- **Predicates**: margin-0 textual splice is byte-forced by `dmn-basic` and confirmed against the sanctioned BSD engine, with an explicit "no tamarin HS source read" log.
- Identifier / constellation / constant / comment scans clean; suite green (83 tests).

Four advisory non-blocking notes recorded (source-order vs hoisted heuristic/tactic/config; no cache slot; empirical tail; BSD-threading dependency).

VERDICT: pass
